kill_fact: The catalyst itself survives independent verification and is genuinely live, dated and binding: FDA Priority Review (+ RTOR) with a July 17, 2026 PDUFA goal date for gedatolisib (HR+/HER2-/PIK3CA WILD-TYPE), NDA accepted Jan 20, 2026; as of June 29, 2026 no approval/CRL/delay has fired (~18 days out, spread open at live ~$99.95). But TWO load-bearing facts in the bull/dossier are WRONG against Celcuity's OWN primary disclosures, and the downside floor is soft. (1) EFFECT SIZE OVERSTATED: the dossier repeatedly cites the wild-type triplet as 16.6mo vs 1.9mo, HR 0.14, ~86% risk reduction; the company's July 28, 2025 PR and the JCO publication state 9.3mo vs 2.0mo (vs fulvestrant), HR 0.24, 76% risk reduction. The HR-0.14 / 16.6mo / 86% figures match NO primary source — the effect is strong but smaller than claimed. (2) CASH OVERSTATED: dossier says $441.5M / ~49M shares / runway-to-2029; Q1 2026 PR (May 14) reports $387.1M cash+ST-investments at Mar 31 2026, ~54.5M wtd-avg shares (cash floor ~$7/sh), runway 'through 2027'. The $60 'thesis floor' is asserted, not backstopped — the only HARD floor is ~$7/sh cash. This is a genuine single-binary with a soft floor: a CRL or delay would invalidate the asset-value assumption the $60 leans on, and the stock already whipsawed ~25% to the low-$90s in June, so it is far more contested than 'priced for approval' implies.
corrections: (1) Wild-type (NDA-basis) triplet effect is HR 0.24 (76% risk reduction), median PFS 9.3mo vs 2.0mo fulvestrant — NOT HR 0.14 / 86% / 16.6mo vs 1.9mo. (Note: wild-type IS the trial's strongest cohort vs the mutant cohort, so approval odds are still favorably tilted — but at the verified, smaller effect size.) (2) Cash is $387.1M at Mar 31 2026 (not $441.5M); shares ~54.5M (cash floor ~$7/sh, not ~$9); funded 'through 2027' (not 2029); prior term loan refinanced into a convertible (note payable $127.9M at Mar 31 2026) — solvency intact, no financing cliff before the event. (3) Treat the $60 'thesis floor' as unverified equity opinion, not a real backstop; the only verified hard floor is ~$7/sh cash, so realistic CRL/delay downside is materially below $60.
evidence: Celcuity IR/GlobeNewswire PR, Jan 20, 2026: FDA accepted gedatolisib NDA (HR+/HER2-/PIK3CA wild-type), Priority Review + RTOR, PDUFA goal date July 17, 2026 — catalyst real, dated, binding, unfired as of June 29, 2026.

Celcuity PR, July 28, 2025 (GlobeNewswire) + JCO publication (announced Mar 9, 2026): VIKTORIA-1 PIK3CA wild-type triplet median PFS 9.3mo vs 2.0mo fulvestrant, HR 0.24 (95% CI 0.17-0.35; p<0.0001), 76% risk reduction — contradicts dossier's HR 0.14 / 16.6mo / 86%.

Celcuity Q1 2026 results PR, May 14, 2026 (BioSpace): cash + short-term investments $387.1M at Mar 31 2026 (not $441.5M); note payable $127.9M; weighted-avg shares ~54.5M; runway 'through 2027'; reaffirms July 17, 2026 PDUFA.

Live quote late June 2026 ~$99.95 (Jun 26 close); stock fell ~25% to ~$92 intra-June and ~23.5% on June 2 — spread open into the statutory PDUFA but materially more contested/volatile than the 'priced-for-approval' framing implies.
